raw_consumer_statement: I closed my account in XXXX of XXXX  because they sent me a replacement card to a wrong address. I never received this or activated it. The original card was hacked. The card at that time was XXXX XXXX XXXX. Now the Citi Cards and they say I am delinquent and I have some late fee charges. The card associated with this charge I have never seen and I never received a statement from them stating that I owed them any amount. I havent received a statement since I closed my account back XXXX of XXXX. The customer service team doesnt seem to speak English well enough to understand my position. I asked them for proof that I have any cards or used any cards since I closed the account. They could not provide proof and they just said that I owed them {$99.00} plus late fees.
